name: both the write-time enforcer and the audit-time gate auto-discover and honor the same ctp.config.yaml
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > repo/pod.yaml && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
rules:
  g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > repo/ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file repo/pod.yaml 2>w.txt; wc=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>a.txt; ac=$?; [ "$wc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'profile=ctp.config.yaml' w.txt && [ "$ac" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' a.txt && echo both-entrypoints-honor-config 1>&2
